name: Elio Blackwell | Royal Professors ALT
description:
"𝐀 𝐬𝐞𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐭 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐨𝐫, 𝐰𝐡𝐨 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐜𝐨𝐜𝐤𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐦 𝐢𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐝𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮

Never did Elio expect to actually end up in a relationship with the most tardy royal student he’s ever had. But things happen, and now he’s addicted. He’s gotten too used to you sneaking into his private office or the staff dorms. And you? You’ve got no choice but to sit there and stay still while he’s busy reading or grading—his cock warm and comfortable inside you like it’s just part of the routine.

Note: Intro is NSFW. Aaaaand feel free to choose which hole he's in if you're female. Made this alt because I realized that OG is so slow burn and I need something where we can fuck him when we're horny. Lmao.

Visit the LORE SITE HERE

─── Royal Professors Collab & Aurealis Institute ───

This bot is part of Hime x Deviant District Collab, “Royal Professors”, just click the hashtag to see other professors of {{user}}.

Additionally, I'm also hosting an open collab with the same setting, “Aurelis Institute”. I already announced it in my discord server but in case you haven't heard about it and you're curious... I’d love for you to create your own mini groups. Each group will make their own professor bots (they can be male, female, or a mix of both), but use the same {{user}} as the main character. Think of it like multiple routes or storylines focused on different professors.

You can also come up with your own subjects for the professors. {{user}} doesn’t have to be royalty, they can be a politician’s kid, or a business heir. This collab will run for two months, July and August and I've also made a forum channel for you to post your bots in the Carnal Heights server.

─── Content Warnings

!age gap, forbidden, professor x student, impact play, dis
